content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/overview/components/HeaderTitle.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 4 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 37
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Code context:
```
   36              <Button
   37                variant={ButtonVariant.link}
   38                isInline

```

### Fix 2
Line: 36
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: Split

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   35            {isDrawerOpen ? undefined : (
   36              <Button
   37                variant={ButtonVariant.link}

```

### Fix 3
Line: 32
Rule [sd-new-absorbing-prop-splititem-component]:
Component <SplitItem> has a new prop `component` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <SplitItem> and determine if any should be moved to the `component` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <SplitItem>{content} other children</SplitItem>
  After:  <SplitItem component=>other children</SplitItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: SplitItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: Split

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: SplitItem
Prop: component
To: React.ReactNode

Code context:
```
   31          <Split hasGutter style={{ alignItems: 'baseline' }}>
   32            <SplitItem isFilled>
   33              <Title headingLevel="h1">{t('Migration Toolkit for Virtualization')}</Title>

```

### Fix 4
Lines: 30, 50
Rule [sd-prop-value-pagesection-variant-light]:
The value "light" is no longer valid for the `variant` prop on <PageSection>.
Choose the appropriate replacement from the valid values: "default", "secondary"

Review the component documentation to determine which value best matches the behavior of "light".

Incident context:
  componentName: PageSection
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: light

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropValueChange
Component: PageSection
Prop: variant
From: light

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 30):
   29      <>
   30        <PageSection variant={PageSectionVariants.light}>
   31          <Split hasGutter style={{ alignItems: 'baseline' }}>

  (line 50):
   49        {inventoryLivelinessError && (
   50          <PageSection variant="light">
   51            {[<InventoryNotReachable key="inventoryNotReachable" />]}

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/overview/components/HeaderTitle.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
Let me start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

**Fix 1 (Line 37): `Button.variant` type changed** — The variant value `ButtonVariant.link` is still valid in the new type (it includes `'link'`). The type just added `'stateful'`. No code change needed.

**Fix 2 (Line 36): Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>`** — Looking at the Button (lines 36-45), it contains `{t('Tips and tricks')}` as children — this is text, NOT an icon. There is no icon element from `@patternfly/react-icons` inside this Button. No change needed for this fix.

**Fix 3 (Line 32): `SplitItem` new `component` prop** — The `SplitItem` at line 32 has a `<Title>` child. The `component` prop is of type `React.ReactNode` and is meant for content that was previously passed as children. However, looking at SplitItem's usage here, it wraps a Title component as children, which is the standard pattern. The `component` prop on SplitItem is for specifying the HTML element type to render (e.g., `"div"`, `"span"`), not for absorbing children content. No change needed.

**Fix 4 (Lines 30, 50): `PageSection variant="light"` → `"default"`** — The value `"light"` is no longer valid. The replacement candidates are `"default"` or `"secondary"`. In PatternFly v6, `"light"` maps to `"default"` (light background is the default variant). This needs to be changed at both locations:
- Line 30: `PageSectionVariants.light` → `"default"` 
- Line 50: `variant="light"` → `variant="default"`

After changing both to string `"default"`, `PageSectionVariants` will no longer be used, so I should remove it from the import.

arguments.after:
Button,
  ButtonVariant,
  PageSection,
  Split,
  SplitItem,
  Title,
} from '@patternfly/react-core';
arguments.before:
Button,
  ButtonVariant,
  PageSection,
  PageSectionVariants,
  Split,
  SplitItem,
  Title,
} from '@patternfly/react-core';

content.text: Now let me verify the final state of the file:

The file looks correct. All changes are properly applied.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `ButtonVariant.link` is still valid in the new type. The only change was the addition of `'stateful'` to the union — no existing usage is affected. |
| Fix 2 | Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>` | **No change needed** | The Button's children is `{t('Tips and tricks')}` (text), not an icon from `@patternfly/react-icons`. No icon content to move to the `icon` prop. |
| Fix 3 | `SplitItem` new `component` prop | **No change needed** | The `SplitItem` wraps a `<Title>` as children in the standard pattern. The `component` prop is for specifying the rendered HTML element type, not for absorbing existing children content. No migration needed. |
| Fix 4 | `PageSection variant="light"` removed | **Applied** | Changed `PageSectionVariants.light` → `"default"` on line 30, and `variant="light"` → `variant="default"` on line 50. Removed unused `PageSectionVariants` from the import statement. In PF v6, `"light"` maps to `"default"` (the light background is now the default variant). |

chunks.response:
The file looks correct. All changes are properly applied.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `ButtonVariant.link` is still valid in the new type. The only change was the addition of `'stateful'` to the union — no existing usage is affected. |
| Fix 2 | Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>` | **No change needed** | The Button's children is `{t('Tips and tricks')}` (text), not an icon from `@patternfly/react-icons`. No icon content to move to the `icon` prop. |
| Fix 3 | `SplitItem` new `component` prop | **No change needed** | The `SplitItem` wraps a `<Title>` as children in the standard pattern. The `component` prop is for specifying the rendered HTML element type, not for absorbing existing children content. No migration needed. |
| Fix 4 | `PageSection variant="light"` removed | **Applied** | Changed `PageSectionVariants.light` → `"default"` on line 30, and `variant="light"` → `variant="default"` on line 50. Removed unused `PageSectionVariants` from the import statement. In PF v6, `"light"` maps to `"default"` (the light background is now the default variant). |
